PolicyEngineStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | ACTIVE | UPDATING | DELETING | CREATE_FAILED | UPDATE_FAILED | DELETE_FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128

Required: Yes

Maximum Length: 256

PolicyEngineId.description: The unique identifier for the policy engine
PolicyEngineId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier for the policy engine

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 12  
Maximum Length: 59  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*-[a-z0-9_]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.description: The customer-assigned immutable name for the policy engine
Name.markdownDescription:
The customer-assigned immutable name for the policy engine

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 48  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.description: A human-readable description of the policy engine's purpose and scope
Description.markdownDescription:
A human-readable description of the policy engine's purpose and scope

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 4096  
Update requires: No interruption

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the policy engine data
EncryptionKeyArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the policy engine data

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(|-cn|-us-gov):kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36}$  
Update requires: Replacement
